items.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
items.summary: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

items.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
items.summary: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

items.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
items.summary: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

items.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
items.summary: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

items.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
items.summary: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

items.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
items.summary: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figures, family members,…

items.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
items.summary: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

items.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
items.summary: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

items.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
items.summary: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

items.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
items.summary: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Available from within the Codex app, each of the new to…

items.title: Anthropic scales Claude Mythos to critical infrastructure in 15+ countries
items.summary: Anthropic is expanding Project Glasswing, its security vulnerability program, and access to Mythos to 150 organizations across 15 countries — targeting critical infrastructure in power, water, healthcare, and communicat…

items.title: Holo3.1: Fast & Local Computer Use Agents
items.summary: Holo3.1: Fast & Local Computer Use Agents

items.title: ZeroDrift raises $10M to protect AI models from themselves
items.summary: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

items.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
items.summary: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.

items.title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
items.summary: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.

items.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
items.summary: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.

items.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
items.summary: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.

items.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
